center.description: Should the label be at the center of the window.Default: `false`

min_periods.description: The minimum amount of periods required for a row to be included in the result set.

rolling_type.description: Type of rolling window. Any numpy function will work.

rolling_type_options.description: Optional options to pass to rolling method. Needed for e.g. quantile operation.

win_type.description: Type of window function. See [SciPy window functions](https://docs.scipy.org/doc/scipy/reference /signal.windows.html#module-scipy.signal.windows) for more details. Some window functions require passing additional parameters to `rolling_type_options`. For instance, to use `gaussian`, the parameter `std` needs to be provided.

window.description: Size of the rolling window in days.
